full_text_tesim: Early Greek majuscule parchment used for repairs

Geometric headpieces on f. 105r, red and black line-work with black dots; ff. 116v, 173v, red with a black triangular pattern; f. 145v, with elevated cross | Minor geometric headpieces throughout, beginning on f. 11v, red and black line-work with dots
